source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/07_(CYAN) GT1717C, GT1717CP/91_인증 - 국내/02. G series + CYAN/2. 보완(준비본)/보완제출_예정)/03 기술문서 심사에 관한 자료/03 제품의 성능 및 안전을 확인하기 위한 자료 (Rev)/04 성능에 관한 자료 (Rev)/1. [G series] 성능시험성적서 (A-PTR-BLU).docx

document.title: 성능 시험 성적서 / Performance Test Report

sourceSummary.oneLine: Performance test report for G series digital flat panel X-ray detector models confirming performance and safety-related specifications.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports technical documentation review by recording performance criteria, methods, results, and attachments for medical image acquisition device models.
keyPoints: The document covers 의료영상획득장치 Digital Falt Panel X-ray Detector models G1417CW, G1417CWP, G1417FW, G1417FWP, G1717CW, G1717CWP, G1717FW, and G1717FWP.
Revision history lists Rev. 3 issued on 2026.04.14 due to product component upgrades.

All summarized test items report PASS, including CsI deposition thickness, sensor type, scintillator, pixel pitch, effective pixel number, sensitivity, MTF, DQE, limited resolution, energy range, A/D conversion, wireless standard, IP range, communication, and trigger mode.
Common specifications include 140μm ± 10% pixel pitch, Max 3.57 lp/mm limited resolution, IEEE 802.11a/b/g/n/ac wireless standard, IP68 per IEC 60529, and 1Giga-bit Ethernet communication.

evidence.claim: The document is a performance test report.
evidence.evidenceText: 성능 시험 성적서 Performance Test Report

evidence.claim: The manufacturer is H&abyz Co., Ltd.
evidence.evidenceText: Manufacturer H&abyz Co., Ltd.

evidence.claim: The product is identified as a medical image acquisition device digital flat panel X-ray detector.
evidence.evidenceText: Product name 의료영상획득장치 Digital Falt Panel X-ray Detector

evidence.claim: The listed model names are G1417CW, G1417CWP, G1417FW, G1417FWP, G1717CW, G1717CWP, G1717FW, and G1717FWP.
evidence.evidenceText: Model Name G1417CW, G1417CWP, G1417FW, G1417FWP, G1717CW, G1717CWP, G1717FW, G1717FWP
evidence.pageTarget: G Series Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

evidence.claim: Revision 3 was issued on 2026.04.14 due to product component upgrades.
evidence.evidenceText: 3 2026.04.14 Revision due to product component upgrades

evidence.claim: The test report confirms performance for medical image acquisition device G1417CW and seven other models.
evidence.evidenceText: 본 시험 성적서는 의료영상획득장치 (G1417CW 외 7종)의 성능 확인을 위한 시험성적서이다.
evidence.pageTarget: G Series Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

evidence.claim: The test period was 2025.11.14 to 2025.11.17.
The test location was H&abyz Co., Ltd. in Yongin-si, Gyeonggi-do.
evidence.evidenceText: 시험장소: ㈜에이치앤아비즈 (경기도 용인시 처인구 처인성로41-16 2동 (우) 17118)

evidence.claim: The CsI deposition thickness test passed for 300μm type and 500μm type models.
evidence.evidenceText: CsI Deposition Thickness ... 300μm type: 340μm ± 10% ... 500μm type: 520μm ± 10% ... PASS

evidence.claim: Measured CsI deposition thickness values were 338.41μm for 300μm type and 507.54μm for 500μm type.
evidence.evidenceText: 1) 300μm type : 338.41μm 기준치 만족 2) 500μm type : 507.54μm 기준치 만족

evidence.claim: Sensor type criteria are PIN-TFT (a-Si, IGZO) and Flexible PIN-TFT (a-Si, IGZO), and the test passed.
evidence.evidenceText: Sensor Type (센서 타입 확인) PIN-TFT (a-Si, IGZO) ... Flexible PIN-TFT (a-Si, IGZO) ... PASS

evidence.claim: The scintillator criterion is CsI and the test passed.
evidence.evidenceText: Scintillator 확인 CsI 사양서 확인 PASS

evidence.claim: The common pixel pitch criterion is 140μm ± 10% and the test passed.
evidence.evidenceText: 공통 Pixel pitch 140μm ± 10% ... PASS

evidence.claim: Effective pixel number criteria are at least 2500 x 3052 pixels, 3040 x 3040 pixels, or 3072 x 3072 pixels depending on model group, and the test passed.
evidence.evidenceText: Effective Pixel Number 확인 2500 x 3052 pixels 이상 ... 3040 x 3040 pixels 이상 ... 3072 x 3072 pixels 이상 ... PASS

evidence.claim: Effective pixel area criteria are 350 x 427.3mm ± 10%, 425.6 x 425.6mm ± 10%, or 430.1 x 430.1mm ± 10% depending on model group.
evidence.evidenceText: Effective Pixel Area 확인 350 x 427.3mm ± 10% 이내 ... 425.6 x 425.6mm ± 10% 이내 ... 430.1 x 430.1mm ± 10% 이내

evidence.claim: Sensitivity testing used RQA5 beam condition, 70kV, 4 to 64mAs, 21mm Al filter, and SID 150cm, and passed.
evidence.evidenceText: Sensitivity ... RQA5 Beam condition, 70kV, 4 ~ 64mAs 21mm Al filter SID: 150cm PASS

evidence.claim: MTF testing used RQA5 beam condition, 70kV, 40mAs, 21mm Al filter, and SID 150cm, and passed.
evidence.evidenceText: MTF Phantom 영상 이미지를 획득하여 Calibration 적용 후 ‘Final Test’ 프로그램을 사용한 측정값이 시험 기준을 만족하는지 확인한다. * 조사 조건 RQA5 Beam condition, 70kV, 40mAs 21mm Al filter SID: 150cm PASS

evidence.claim: DQE testing used RQA5 beam condition, 70kV, 40mAs, 21mm Al filter, and SID 150cm, and passed.
evidence.evidenceText: DQE Bright 영상 이미지를 획득하여 Calibration 적용 후 ‘Final Test’ 프로그램을 사용한 측정값이 시험 기준을 만족하는지 확인한다. * 조사 조건 RQA5 Beam condition, 70kV, 40mAs 21mm Al filter SID: 150cm PASS

evidence.claim: The limited resolution criterion is Max 3.57 lp/mm and the test passed.
evidence.evidenceText: Limited resolution Max 3.57 lp/mm 1/(2*pixel pitch) 값을 확인한다. PASS

evidence.claim: The energy range criterion is operation at 40kvp and 150kvp, and all listed models passed.
evidence.evidenceText: Energy range 40kvp, 150kvp 정상동작 40kvp / 150kvp로 조사 시 영상 획득되는지 확인. PASS

evidence.claim: A/D conversion uses 16bit data from the ROIC board and converts to 14bit by removing the lower 2 bits.
evidence.evidenceText: ROIC 보드의 A/D 변환 해상도는 16bit이며, 하위 2비트를 제거하여 14bit로 변환하여 사용하는 방식임.

evidence.claim: The wireless standard criterion is IEEE 802.11a/b/g/n/ac and the test passed.
evidence.evidenceText: Wireless standard IEEE 802.11a/b/g/n/ac Wifi 모듈 사양서 확인 PASS

evidence.claim: The IP range criterion is IP68 according to IEC 60529 and the test passed.
evidence.evidenceText: IP Range IP68 IEC 60529에 따른다 PASS

evidence.claim: The communication criterion is 1Giga-bit Ethernet and the test passed.
evidence.evidenceText: Communication 1Giga-bit Ethernet 사양서 확인 PASS

evidence.claim: Line trigger mode and auto trigger mode were verified as operating normally and passed.
evidence.evidenceText: Trigger mode Line trigger 모드 정상동작 ... PASS Auto trigger 모드 정상동작 ... PASS

evidence.claim: The conclusion states that performance setting values for the medical image acquisition device are acceptable.
evidence.evidenceText: 해당 시험 결과를 통해 의료영상획득장치 (모델명: HnX-R1, G series)의 성능 설정 값에 이상 없음을 확인하였다.
evidence.pageTarget: G Series Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

evidence.claim: The attachments include a-Si, IGZO, CsI, WiFi module, IP68 test reports, IMX8 datasheet, and KGMP certificate materials.
evidence.evidenceText: [첨부 1.1] a-Si 사양서 [첨부 1.2] IGZO 사양서 [첨부 2.] CsI 사양서 확인 [첨부 3.] Wifi module 사양서 확인 [첨부 4.1] IP68 test report(G1417CW) [첨부 4.2] IP68 test report(G1717CW) [첨부 5.] IMX8 DATASHHET [첨부 6.] KGMP 적합인정서

reviewFlags.reason: Authority or jurisdiction is not explicitly stated in the source text; MFDS/domestic appears only in source metadata/path signal, so authorityOrJurisdiction is left empty.
Product/model evidence is partly ambiguous: the model list contains G1417/G1717 series models, while the conclusion also states '모델명: HnX-R1, G series'.
The source text contains apparent OCR or source spelling issues such as 'Digital Falt Panel' and 'DATASHHET'.
